creator: liangtai.s4@gmail.com
text:
This is dditional patch for upgrading multimedia/qmmp from v0.6.6
to v0.6.7, and multimedia/qmmp-plugin-pack from v0.6.4 to v0.6.5.

On multimedia/qmmp, the option FFMPEG0_11 in FFMPEG options group
is removed because multimedia/ffmpeg-011 already passed over its
expiration date.
